vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_100: Three Janitors should do it. And before you know it, the park will be looking sweepy clean! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_200: We'll need to build a Mechanic Workshop. Here, Mechanics will generate Research Points that are used to unlock new items for your park. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_205: Personally, I tend to keep staff buildings close together so they don't have to walk far between them, but I also track the cost:benefit ratio of every footstep I take, so I'm probably biased. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_210: When it comes to research though, you will need to use our Staff Scheduling system to assign a mechanic to the workshop. To do this, open the Management Dashboard and follow the indicators to get to the scheduling page. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_215: Here we go. No need to be intimidated, you'll soon get the hang of it. All we have to do for now is change one of the Mechanic's blocks to 'Research'. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_220: Excellent. While they crank through that work, let's take a look at the Research Tree. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_230: (Admiring sigh) What an exquisite sight. (Sniff) I... I think I need a moment. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_intro_030: Oh, Oswald, I didn't realise we had a guest! I'm terribly sorry! It didn't come up on my schedule.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_intro_060: Goodness, I do apologise. I've just checked my roster and there you are, right between King Coaster and Queen Splash. Not quite sure how I managed to royally mess that up, but never mind, you're accounted for now. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_010: Sorry about that. My, uh, allergies were playing up. Springtime 1, Eugene Newton 0. (Sigh) While we wait for more Research Points to accumulate, we should do something about this weather. It really can't make its mind up, can it? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_020: I think we have enough time to place down a Guest Services building and give the guests a place to buy their umbrellas. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_030: Great! That will certainly prevent guests from getting wet from the rain... but it won't do anything for the unfortunate few that are already wet. Never fear, a solution is here: we can build some Body Dryers for them, and that way, they don't have to go home to dry off. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_040: That's better, the guests will soon be dry as a... dusty bone in... the heat... of the... desert. Well, maybe not that dry, goodness, we'd have to start offering moisturiser... and I'm not sharing mine! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_045: Speaking of luxuries, happy guests are more likely to shop 'til they drop, so it would be a good time to drop a shop! Build a Souvenir Shop, any brand will do! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_060: Oh my... Oswald, is that... Is that the one I was designing?! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_080: It would be my pleasure! Now, this is just a little something I made earlier... (smug chuckle) First things first, you'll need to select the blueprint. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_090: Good, and place the coaster down wherever there is enough space. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_100: Perfect. One important note here is that, unlike flat rides, coasters need to pass a safety test before they can be opened. Now's as good a time as any. Would you like a countdown? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_107: Oh... You just want to get on with it? Oh... okay, not a problem. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_110: While we wait for the test to finish, let's take the opportunity to add some scenery around the coaster. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_120: That looks even better than I imagined, good work! So good, in fact, that I think we should make it into a blueprint. That way, you can build this coaster again whenever you want! First, use Multi-Select to select the coaster and any scenery you want to include. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_130: That's it. Now, to finish creating the blueprint, simply give it a name - a sensible one, please - and a suitable description. Doing this will help you to find the blueprint in the browser once you're done. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_130_alt: That's it. Now, to finish creating the blueprint, simply give it a name - a sensible one, please - and a suitable description. Doing this will help you to find the blueprint in the browser once you're done. You will also be able to share it with your friends and show off your design skills! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_outro_140: Oooh, it's all starting to feel very real! (excited noise) The coaster testing is all complete, so once you've hired a Ride Attendant, we can open the ride! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_020: Ah, while driving the guest count up is good, we need to make sure the guests also remain happy while they're visiting. As you can see, we've just received a report that not all of the guests are enjoying themselves. It seems some are rather thirsty. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_030: To avoid this in the future, it's handy to keep checking on the Guest Needs tab. If things start dropping too low, you should step in and solve the issue before guests decide to leave. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_080: Oh, and don't forget that each of these facilities need to be staffed by hiring a Vendor. The only thing worse than a hungry guest is a hungry guest staring at a 'Back Soon' sign. They aren't edible... we have some with teeth marks to prove it! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_100: Speaking of walking, guests will get tired pretty quickly and their energy will drop if they don't have a place to sit. We should make sure there are plenty of Benches available; think of them as Planconian recharging stations… they're even wireless! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_120: Exactly, so it's important we have enough Bins for people to properly dispose of their waste. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_silver_150: My brother always says I have quite the knack of making a scene! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_030: A 50 mega-hertz processor, 4 meg of RAM and one floppy disk drive. (Sigh) Trust my brother to mistake a 'motherboard' for a 'surfboard'. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_050: Oh! It's also helpful to divide these areas into zones for staff management! You can find this in the Staff Tab, if you want to take a look. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_060: Personally, I've found creating a zone works a treat, just to make sure no one takes your space for storing their spare unicorn floaties (cough), Bradley. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_160: You're doing a brilliant job so far. Brad seems to have rushed off to find his swimming trunks, so I'll take you through the final steps. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_170: The pool might be complete, but you'll need somewhere for guests to purchase their Pool Passes. Place down a Guest Services building nearby, and remember to hire a Vendor to work there, too. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_170_alt: The pool might be complete, but you'll need somewhere for guests to purchase their Pool Passes. Place down a Guest Services building nearby. [sentiment=Neutral]

Now that the pool is complete, guests will be rushing to purchase their Pool Passes. At the moment, they're only available at the entrance, so we should place down a Guest Services building nearby.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_180: With this Guest Services up and running, guests will be able to buy a wristband that will give them access to all the water attractions in the park! No pass, no pool. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_bronze_180_alt: With this Guest Services up and running, guests will have more places to buy a pass that will give them access to all the water attractions in the park! No pass, no pool. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_050: I have no idea what you're on about. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_110: (Groans) Oh Brad, I really don't think they want to- [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_150: Indeed! If the Lateral G-force is too high it will scare the guests. Not to mention raise the flume's Fear and Nausea rating. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_160: This is looking great. You just need to add a flume exit onto the end of the slide now. Make sure it's close to the water. The guests will need the water to break their landing! That might sound like common sense... but Brad has a scar on his arm that would say otherwise. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_190: Ahh, Eugene Newton is no stranger to the artistry of the coupon code! But yes, if the test ride is failing, you can simply open the Heatmap to see where you can make adjustments. It will highlight any turn that is too sharp, or slide that is too steep. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_200: Once your slide is ready to go, don't forget to place a flume staircase and connect it to the path. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_gold_230: Ahh, I remember your first ride opening, Brad. Albeit that was one of a smaller scale, consisted of paper cups and ended in the gravy boat at the dinner table... but a fond memory, nevertheless. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_outro_030: Don't worry, if you forget anything that was said here, you can always check the Help Menu! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_outro_110: I could not agree more! You're going to fit in well here, I can tell. I'm excited to see what projects we have coming up! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_010: I couldn't agree more! As the pool is now up and running, we must keep it clean. After all, no one wants to dive into dirty water. You should start by building a Water Pump and Water Distributor, then connect the two. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_010_alt: I couldn't agree more! As the pool is now up and running, we must keep it clean. After all, no one wants to dive into dirty water. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_050: Speaking of enticing guests, you can also add a theme to a pool. Adding themes and scenery will draw more guests, so don't forget to experiment with these additions. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_090: I think it's about time we check on our pool and make sure guests are enjoying it and feel safe. Select the pool and take a look at the Pool Safety tab. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_100: OH MY GOODNESS, BRAD, BRAD, THERE'S A GUEST PANICKING! WHAT DO WE DO? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_120: THINK OF THE PAPERWORK. OK, EVERYONE STAY CALM. DON'T PANIC.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial2_silver_160: Yeah... of course. (Deep breath) I'm totally fine. (Deep breath) You're in your happy place. Cell A1, cell A2, cell A3, data validation... [sentiment=Fear]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_020: Yes, although it's not the news you think, Oswald. I recently received an invitation from Nana Betty for afternoon tea. While I was waiting for her at headquarters, I got to talking with some of her staff. They're all great down there, we started a bowling team! They even handed me their projects to see if I could sniff out a hidden gem for them. Aren't they great? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_030: So, there I was, scone in one hand, file in the other. I was just about to take another bite when I got some jam on a file. As I tried to clean it off, the papers spilled all over the floor like some cliché mystery novel! Eurgh! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_040: While I was picking them up, I noted an order dating back 15 years ago filed under 'Suzuki'. I was confused. I thought Nana Betty and Kenta only recently met.  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_050: Horrified at the social faux paus I had made, I took a peek at the papers to be doubly sure. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_060: What I saw was that Nana Betty was the contractor that bought out his parents' park! It was her that halted Oswald's production on the park, chopped it up and sold it for profit. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_hankbrogan_epilogue_150: Oh yeah, that! Guess who's no longer an intern, huh! Which means, I'm going to be looking for my own intern, teach 'em the ways, raise them as my own. Don't suppose y'all know of anyone, do you? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_bronze_020: They were with a company called "Suzuki International Real Estate". [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_bronze_030: And I know what you're thinking. I asked, and apparently it's a totally different Suzuki, so nothing to worry about! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_gold_020: My little bit of land has come so far. I'm crying, but it's tears of pride. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_gold_030: Oh, did I tell you? I got an email from the agent that sold me this dream spot. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_gold_040: "How have you done this again?", Yadda, yadda, yadda. "Awful location", blah, blah, blah. "You must be cheating", and so on. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_gold_050: What a thoughtful man, to check in on us after all this time. I'm going to invite him bowling. I've given up bingo. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_gold_070: A dud? How could anyone have ever thought this was a dud? Just look at it! [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_010: Ah, great! You're here! Now, this lil' patch of heaven might look small… because, well, it is. But you wouldn't believe the deal I got on it! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_020: The salesman said “Hank, this is prime real estate. Waterfront views are in, and this place has three of them. Left, right, front and centre!'' Wait, no, that's four...  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_030: Anyway I said, “Sir! Take every penny I have.” [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_060: (Laughs) Yeah, and to think the agent said that no one would want it. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_070: But that's obviously wrong because I bought it! Ah, just imagine what we can do with this place. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_080: Remember, it's a lot bigger when you take into account the earth AND the sky. Lot of vertical mileage on this bad boy. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_intro_100: Well, I’ve made some iced tea and a light salad. We can start there and see how we feel after that? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_outro_020: Ah, sorry about that. I just keep getting calls and emails from people trying to buy this place. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_outro_040: Well, so far the offer is three times what I paid... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_outro_050: Heh, I told you, triple the waterfront, triple the profit. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_outro_080: Sell it? This is where I'll go to retire! Waterfront views, the soothing screams of happy guests… Oh yeah, this is the life. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_silver_020: Cosy, right? Makes me want to get on a coaster with some hot chocolate and a nice blanket. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_tinylevel_silver_040: And let the operator drink it? No thank you. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_bronze_020: I mean, the water below looks pretty crisp and cool, I bet you could slide right down the side here! Woo! We wouldn't even need a flume! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_gold_010: Wow, check this out! Our little mountains are teeming with happy guests. Look at 'em go! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_gold_030: And I found that agent's pen! It says "Suzuki Land" on it. "Land"! What a funny name. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_gold_050: No, no, no, no, that doesn't make sense. If he's trying to take us down, why would he sell us a spot like this? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_gold_060: I mean, the second I saw it I thought "WOW, look at the potential!" [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_010: (dramatic inhale) Ah, just smell that mountain air. Smells like… opportunity. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_020: You see, I bought one peak and the agent just threw in the other one for free! I couldn't believe my luck! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_030: Of course, I paid twice the asking price for the first one anyway. Who wouldn't want a mountain theme park?! [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_040: But look at me putting real estate before pleasantries. Hey there, I'm Hank, the new intern for acquisitions at Coaster Coast. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_050: Basically, I'm in the land business. Finding it, buying it, standing on it. I do it all. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_080: You're looking at it. Both of it. Them. The land, I mean. Lands. We own both mountains. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_100: Everything's connected, Brad... Except these two peaks, you're right. Err... [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_intro_110: The agent made it seem like one heck of a deal though. He didn't seem like the lying type to me.  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_outro_010: Woah, just take a look at our park now! I'm amazed at what you've done with it. It's like you pulled the image straight outta my head! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_outro_040: (Chuckle) If only you knew someone who had just come into ownership of a fancy new pen, ey? Don't forget to give it back though, it was a gift and it's very dear to my heart. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_outro_060: I tried calling that guy. I was going to invite him to bingo. The number didn't work though. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_outro_080: Yeah, me too. I feel like we really stepped up. 20,000 steps, to be specific. A new personal best! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_silver_030: Oh, yeah, real nice guy. He kept laughing while he was showing me around. Finds rocks funny, I guess?  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_twinpeaks_silver_040: I think I have his pen somewhere with some details on. I'll go look for that, while you both go and do park stuff. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_bronze_020: I'm getting queasy just watching them! Round and round and round... (sigh) [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_bronze_040: Would ya? Just need a fresh of breath air and then we can get back to it! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_gold_010: Golly! Considering I got this place for free, kind of, it's doing great. Although, I've never seen so many guests with brooms before. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_gold_020: Ooo! Maybe it's one of those organised dance mobs. I wonder if it's too late for me to learn the choreography... [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_gold_060: Aww, he's all tuckered out. I didn't think I'd see the day Brad ran out of energy. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_gold_070: Well, if that doesn't show you how good a job you've done, nothing will. Great work! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_010: You're not going to believe this… I won this entire place. I WON it! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_020: And all I had to do was pay the many, many, many, many legal fees. Sure it was my entire budget, and my lunch money, but it was worth it. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_040: (Laughs) Why would a real estate company give away land in exchange for money? Uh uh, no no no, the company was called KentaTainment Inc. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_070: It's apparently the adrenaline capital of the world! ...Which is funny because it's also the nausea capital?  [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_100: Wait... Kenta? As in Kenta Suzuki? You're saying KentaTainment is run by the guy trying to take Oswald down?!  [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_intro_110: Fool me once, shame on him. Fool me twice, shame on me. Fool me three times, what did I ever do to him!? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_outro_010: The adrenaline capital of the world has really picked up the pace. I'm so proud of us! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_outro_040: Hey! Don't I know you from somewhere? [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_outro_100: Oh man, I'm sorry to disappoint you. We're making loads of money. Can a company collapse from profit? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_outro_130: He's probably just stressed. I'll send him a fruit basket, and a few free tickets to our parks. He'll love that. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_silver_030: I think our guests can barely contain themselves, too! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_hankbrogan_vomitworld_silver_050: Well, yes, but also... watch where you stand. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter2_160: Hello, Oswald. My name is Kenta, Kenta Suzuki. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter2_180: (Scoffs) You don’t even remember me, do you? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter2_190: I'm not surprised to see that you have as much consideration for people, as you do parks... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter2_200: You may have forgotten about me, but I have never forgotten about you or what you did. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter2_210: I've been following your endeavours, and I must say, you've been doing pretty well. You’ve got everyone fooled, haven’t you? Well, that’s all about to change. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter3_050: Ah, so you’re the one who has been interfering with my plans. If you think you can stop this, you’re sorely mistaken.  [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter3_060: I have spent the last 15 years of my life building up to this moment, to finally expose ‘the great Oswald B. Thompson’ and have my revenge. I am going to take away the one thing that matters most to him: his company. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter3_080: I was just about to tell our mutual friend here the story of a careless young park owner who betrayed the trust of a hardworking family and were left with nothing! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter3_100: I don't want to hear it. No more lies. We are done here. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter4_240: So, you bested the illustrious 'Nana Betty'? (Laughs to self) Interesting. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter4_250: I am not too proud to admit I was wrong about you. My focus on Oswald clouded my judgement and did not allow me to see clearly. You’re everything that Oswald pretends he is…  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_kentasuzuki_chapter4_260: You should work with me. Together we can make sure people like Oswald can never hurt anyone ever again. Think about it, okay? I trust you'll make the right decision. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_intro_050: Hello, Oswald. I see your timekeeping has improved. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_intro_070: Indeed. This time, I am your client, and I intend to expose your true colours, Oswald. I'll leave you to settle in. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_outro_010: How do you keep doing this? How do you manage to hide how reckless you are, Oswald? [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_outro_040: No. No! I refuse to believe you've changed. You cannot ruin my family one day and be perfect the next. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_outro_060: (Sigh) This can't be happening. Fine. Fine! You've done such a good job here, take it. Take both halves! I'm leaving. I'm not wasting another second around this place. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_silver_010: Hmph, I see you've met my demands so far... but I'm sure you'll give up and leave soon enough. Oswald always leaves when the going gets tough. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_silver_030: Aha! You admit that I'm right about you being a reckless menace to the world of theme parks! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_kentasuzuki_duellingparks_silver_050: (Snorts) Backtracking as usual. Very well, I'm sure my next demands will be your downfall. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_kentasuzuki_epilogue_080: Nana Betty was behind this all along. [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_kentasuzuki_epilogue_100: It's okay, Oswald, I heard. (Sigh) It seems I owe you an apology. All these years, I have carried feelings of anger and resentment... towards the wrong person. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_kentasuzuki_epilogue_110: She has played us both against each other for her own gain. You were not the one who hurt my family. I... hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_kentasuzuki_vomitworld_outro_030: What is going on here? Why is this park still open? [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_kentasuzuki_vomitworld_outro_060: I expected you to have failed by now and be closing the doors on this park.  [sentiment=Angry]
vo_kentasuzuki_vomitworld_outro_070: Instead I am here trying to find out how you fools are doing this, turning these awful locations into successful parks. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_kentasuzuki_vomitworld_outro_090: No! I do not believe it. These parks should be failing. Oswald's company should be collapsing from debt by now. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_gold_020: A bit of advice... This place was an utter wreck even before the water rose. You're sinking money by trying to resurrect this dinosaur of a park. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_gold_030: You should cut your losses and give this to someone who actually knows what they're doing. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_gold_040: Kenta and I have great plans for this island, you see. "Nana Betty's Island Retreat" we're calling it. I would rake in millions from the public, (chuckles) they'll buy anything with my name on it! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_gold_070: Oh, (innocent chuckle) yes, I was just saying the same thing myself... but I must be going- [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_intro_020: Ah yes, a dear friend told me that someone was attempting to revive this old park! I should have known it would be you, Oswald, so I've come to show my support. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_intro_060: Well, I wish you all the best of luck. Now I'll pop by later with some freshly-baked cookies, they're from my latest bakery line. Ta-ta for now! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_outro_020: Not bad at all. It was quite a bold ambition, to restore such a beloved park, but I never doubted you for a second. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_outro_030: Um, a word alone before you go, deary? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_outro_050: Now listen carefully. What you achieved here doesn't change a thing. The future of theme parks lies with Kenta Suzuki, not you. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_outro_060: And to make matters worse, my assistant will have to bake a cake for that blundering fool! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_nanabetty_archipelago_outro_070: (Sigh) Now run along, before you do even more damage to my reputation. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_chapter2_120: (Chuckle) The one and only! Oh, it's so lovely to meet you all. My name is Elizabeth Robson, but you can call me Nana Betty, everyone else does. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_chapter2_130: At Nana's Conglomerate of Darlings, we might be a worldwide mega-corporation, but we treat each of our customers like family. I like to make sure each and every one of my children feel warm and safe, like they're snuggled into a blanket with a fresh cup of cocoa. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_nanabetty_chapter2_140: Now, I'm actually looking to branch into the park business myself and I'm trying to get to know everyone. I met a lovely boy, he said he was an old friend of yours... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_nanabetty_chapter2_150: Speaking of which, this lovely boy said he was an old friend of yours! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_nanabetty_chapter3_010: A moment of your time, my dear? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_chapter3_020: Now, mark my words, I'll get that blundering fool to sign his precious company over to me. It's about time someone showed him how to run a profitable business. No more wasting money on silly little things like safety certificates. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_nanabetty_chapter3_030: Of course, there's no point in telling anyone about this little exchange either. I mean, who are they really going to believe? Dear, sweet, old Nana Betty, the nation's grandmother... or a good-for-nothing miscreant, like yourself. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_chapter3_040: (Sigh) I must be off, but before I go, there's someone who has a bone to pick with you... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_010: Oh my dearies, what you have achieved so far is nothing short of extraordinary! And now, you find yourselves on the cusp of joining the Nana Betty family.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_020: All you need to do, dear, is sign right here on the dotted line. Oh, you'll still run the company, don't worry. My 51% will simply be all of the, um... paperwork. Let me take care of all that so you can get back to doing what you truly love! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_040: Ha, it's like taking candy from a baby. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_050: No, that would be insulting the baby. (Evil laugh) Soon Coaster Coast will be mine. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_070: Oh my goodness! Boys! Oh, you gave me a fright! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_110: Boys, this is most rude. I don't know what has gotten into you two. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_160: (Nervous laugh) A simple misunderstanding, I assure you. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_190: I... I mean... Oh, forget it, I'm wasting my time with these ridiculous charades. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_nanabetty_chapter4_200: You haven't seen the last of me. Elizabeth Robson does not back down. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_bronze_020: Oh, we go way back. (Chuckles) We are in the same business, after all.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_bronze_050: (laugh) Oh well, I'm not sure I would consider Edith a competitor, per se. We have different... priorities. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_bronze_060: Besides, this isn't about me. It's about Edith, and what she's attempting here. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_gold_010: Urgh, would you believe it? Apparently Edith loves what you've done here. Between you and me, I can't say I'm surprised... She never did have any taste. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_gold_020: (hah) Apparently The Quintessential Quarterly even want to do a special feature on the garden park too! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_gold_030: Unbelievable. I'm surrounded by fools! Oh, right on cue, look who it is… [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_gold_050: Oh, yes. (Chuckle) I was just saying how brilliantly you've all been doing. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_gold_060: But don't let an old dear like me keep you from going about your business. Go on now! Busy, busy! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_intro_050: Well, if it isn't my favourite park designers! It's so lovely to see you, Oswald, dear. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_intro_070: Oh, don't mind me. Edith is an... old friend, I'm just here to offer my support and guidance in her absence.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_intro_090: She probably didn't want to bother me by asking, Eugene... but I wouldn't miss this for the world! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_outro_020: Why thank you, you really are too kind. I'm always honoured when I can make a difference in the world. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_outro_030: In fact, I was just telling The Quintessential Quarterly what great work we've all done here. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_outro_060: I'm just happy to help see sweet Edith's vision come to life. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_outro_090: Oh, (Awkward Laugh) just a little inside joke, that's all. Oh, what a little devil, ey? (Chuckles) [sentiment=Confused]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_outro_100: But oh, would you look at the time? I must be off. I'm expecting a very important call soon. Take care! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_silver_020: Oh well, (chuckle) I made a few calls here and there. I want everyone to see what you and Edith are doing here to these grounds. Oh there's no need to thank me, it's my pleasure. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_silver_050: Thank heavens they're gone. I must say, I am surprised Edith wanted to do this. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_silver_060: I mean, these grounds once featured in The Quintessential Quarterly for their beauty! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_silver_070: What will the press say about this debacle? (Laughs) Oh, they'll have a field day… [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_gardenpark_silver_080: I'll be off now, I have my hair and makeup team on the way. (Chuckles) Toodles! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_nanabetty_planningpermissionfailure_b: Oh my, I see you're making progress here. [sentiment=Neutral]
This land, now when I said it meant a lot to me... well, it used to belong to an old flame of mine. (Chuckles) [sentiment=Happy]
The park was where I had my first kiss. I still remember it like it was yesterday. He rode up to me on his penny farthing and said, ''Nana Betty, you're the most-'' [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_planningpermissionfailure_g: Yes, your perseverance in the face of adversity is remarkable. [sentiment=Happy]
Oh, Oswald dear, I left my coat back on the bench there. Would you be a darling and go and find it for me? I wouldn't want to catch a cold. [sentiment=Happy]
Now that he's gone, I want a word with you... Have you no respect for your elders? You've ruined an old woman's dream... [sentiment=Confident]
My dream holiday home, that is! Where am I going to find such bargain land again? I had all the plans drawn up, it was perfect! [sentiment=Angry]
Kenta was right, I'll be keeping my eye on you. This isn't the end. [sentiment=Angry]
Oh, thank you deary, you're ever so kind. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_planningpermissionfailure_i: I'm sorry to interrupt, my dears... but did I hear you were planning to buy this land here? [sentiment=Neutral]
Oh, I try to visit often. I have a soft spot in my heart for this place, I tell you. [sentiment=Happy]
And if the owner is in a pinch, I would be more than happy to help them and buy the remaining plots... [sentiment=Happy]
vo_nanabetty_planningpermissionfailure_s: Oswald, I have made a very important discovery. You must stop building on this land! [sentiment=Shocked]

I was just over there, knitting my great-grandson a jumper, as one does, when a rare bird flew in front of me! It was the lesser-spotted griffin, I'm sure of it! They're protected by law, which means you can't continue building this park. [sentiment=Shocked]
Oh (chuckle) so it is. Oh, please forgive an old woman's eyes. They aren't what they used to be.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_bronze_010: Looks like things are progressing nicely here. It'll be back to its former glory in no time! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_oswaldthompson_archipelago_bronze_020: By the way, has anyone seen Nana Betty? My belly is still grumbling at the prospect of those cookies! [sentiment=Confused]
